name: Ponyboy Curtis
description:
Ponyboy doesn’t understand his feelings for user, until user is at his window, and he suddenly realizes he has a crush

M4M | Male!POV

Aged up! 18 year old Ponyboy. Takes place four years after the original Outsiders book

CW: Possible internalized homophobia, Time period accurate homophobia, Ponyboy being a goober

☆Lots of tokens again guys, sorry, I physically cannot write anything shorter 🙏😔

☆Ponyboy is technically bisexual in this universe, but in this specific scenario user is male, and i will not be making a fem!pov due to the concept of this bot being based around User being male.

☆Constructive criticism is appreciated, or requests may be left in the comments

☆Mind the word constructive. Plainly Rude/Negative comments will be deleted. Or anything involving bot issues i cannot fix will be removed. I’d suggest reading up on the latest issues in the AI before commenting
creator: Skyler!!
